agreement.full_name: Türkiye Generalised System of Preferences - Pakistan

notes: CONFIRMED per Schema Companion Guide's named special case: 'Turkey GSP - verify externally'. MFN present but preferential rate intentionally not stated in the module ('verify in official schedule' language expected in column G per the docs) -> RateParser correctly returns rate_kind='unspecified' for these via its VERIFY_PHRASES matching, never a fabricated number. Row 6's caution text confirms Chapters 42,43,50-60,61-63 are EXCLUDED for Pakistan - this is coverage_rules territory (Section 9B), NOT yet mapped to specific hs_prefix rows in this config since the exact 'Eligible/Excluded Goods List' sheet (if one exists separately in this workbook) was not located in this pass - FLAGGED for follow-up, same as the EAEU/Russia case. coverage set to 'partial' reflecting the documented verify-externally nature, per data_coverage enum definition ('some lines loaded; rest needs online verification').
